description: DER ECDSA secp256k1 signature fixtures for parser tests. Each entry has (sig_hex, expected_r, expected_s, valid, notes).

vectors.name: canonical_low_s
vectors.notes: BIP-66 strict DER + BIP-62 low-s. Public test vector.

vectors.name: high_r_with_msb_set
vectors.notes: r has MSB set; encoding requires leading 0x00.

vectors.name: malformed_negative_int
vectors.notes: r encoded as 0x80 (MSB set without leading 0x00 = negative).

vectors.name: malformed_unnecessary_leading_zero
vectors.notes: Both r and s encoded with unneeded leading 0x00.

vectors.name: malformed_zero_r
vectors.notes: r = 0 is invalid by ECDSA spec.

notes: sig_hex strings have spaces removed before parsing (formatting aid only).
These vectors test parser strictness, not signature validity over a curve.
